nasb.text: and to bring to light what is the administration of the mystery which for ages has been hidden in God who created all things;

esv.text: and to bring to light for everyone what is the plan of the mystery hidden for ages in God, who created all things,

cnv.text: 並且使眾人明白那奧祕的救世計劃是甚麼，

ccb.text: 让全人类都明白世代隐藏在创造万物的上帝里面的奥秘，

csbs.text: 并且使所有的人都明白这奥秘的计划到底是什么，这奥秘自古以来被隐藏在创造万有的神里面，
